sources.name: Home Office — Irregular Migration to the UK
NAO — Investigation into the UK-Rwanda Partnership
Ministry of Justice — Tribunal Statistics Quarterly
Home Office — National Referral Mechanism Statistics

channelCrossings.label: Channel Crossings (Small Boats)
channelCrossings.description: Number of people detected arriving in the UK via small boats across the English Channel, by calendar year.

channelCrossingsQuarterly.label: Channel Crossings Quarterly
channelCrossingsQuarterly.description: Quarterly small boat crossings of the English Channel. Shows seasonal pattern — crossings peak in summer.

asylumDecisions.label: Asylum Applications and Initial Decisions
asylumDecisions.description: Asylum applications lodged in the UK, initial decisions made, grants of protection, and refusals, by calendar year. Covers 2001-2024.

methodologyBreaks.label: New Asylum Model
methodologyBreaks.description: Introduction of New Asylum Model changed case management

grantRateByNationality.label: Asylum Grant Rate by Nationality (2023)
grantRateByNationality.description: Initial decision grant rate by nationality, year ending December 2023. Grant includes refugee status, humanitarian protection, and discretionary leave.

grantRateTimeSeries.label: Grant Rates by Nationality Over Time
grantRateTimeSeries.description: Initial decision grant rate (%) for key nationalities, 2019-2024. Shows how grant rates shift as decision volumes and policy change.

applicationsByNationality.label: Asylum Applications by Nationality
applicationsByNationality.description: Asylum applications by top nationalities, 2018-2024. Tracks the changing national composition of asylum seekers.

asylumBacklog.label: Asylum Cases Awaiting Initial Decision
asylumBacklog.description: Number of asylum cases awaiting an initial decision at end of calendar year, 2010-2024.

asylumBacklogQuarterly.label: Asylum Backlog Quarterly
asylumBacklogQuarterly.description: Quarterly snapshot of asylum cases awaiting initial decision, 2019-2024. Shows the surge, peak, and recent reduction.

asylumAppeals.label: Asylum Appeals (First-tier Tribunal)
asylumAppeals.description: First-tier Tribunal asylum appeals: cases lodged, determined, allowed (overturned), and dismissed. Overturn rates show how often initial refusals are reversed on appeal.

dublinTransfers.label: Dublin III Transfers (UK)
dublinTransfers.description: Dublin III asylum transfers. Outgoing = from UK to EU states. Incoming = from EU states to UK. System ceased for UK on 1 January 2021.

returns.label: Returns and Removals from the UK
returns.description: Enforced removals, voluntary departures, and foreign national offender (FNO) returns, 2004-2024. Shows the long-run decline in enforcement capacity.

internationalComparison.label: Asylum Applications per 100,000 Population
internationalComparison.description: Asylum applications per 100,000 population for selected European countries, 2015-2023. UK figure from Home Office (not in Eurostat post-Brexit).

accommodationCosts.label: Asylum Accommodation Costs
accommodationCosts.description: Total asylum accommodation costs by financial year, number of hotel residents, and dispersal accommodation residents.

processingTimes.label: Asylum Processing Times (UK)
processingTimes.description: Approximate median weeks from application to initial decision, UK, 2014-2024.

processingComparison.label: Asylum Processing Times by Country (2023)
processingComparison.description: Median weeks to initial asylum decision, selected European countries, 2023.

irregularRoutes.label: Irregular Migration by Route
irregularRoutes.description: Comparison of irregular migration routes: Channel small boat crossings, estimated visa overstayers, and lorry/freight detections, 2019-2024.

detention.label: Immigration Detention
detention.description: Persons entering immigration detention and snapshot detention population at year end, 2010-2024.

resettlement.label: Resettlement Schemes (Safe/Legal Routes)
resettlement.description: Arrivals via safe/legal resettlement routes: VPRS (Syrian), UKRS, ACRS and ARAP (Afghan), 2014-2024. Does not include Homes for Ukraine (separate visa scheme).

crossingsDemographics.label: Channel Crossings Demographics
crossingsDemographics.description: Composition of small boat arrivals by age/gender group, 2020-2024. Shows growing proportion of women and children.

modernSlaveryReferrals.label: Modern Slavery NRM Referrals
modernSlaveryReferrals.description: National Referral Mechanism modern slavery referrals, 2016-2024. Many referrals come from individuals in the asylum system.

caseworkerStaffing.label: Asylum Caseworker Staffing
caseworkerStaffing.description: Full-time equivalent asylum decision-makers, 2018-2024. Shows the staffing surge in response to backlog.

globalDisplacement.label: Global Forced Displacement
globalDisplacement.description: Total forcibly displaced people worldwide and refugees under UNHCR mandate, 2001-2024. Rose from 40m (2001) to 123m (2024), driven by conflicts in Syria, Afghanistan, Ukraine, Sudan, and others. This global surge is the structural driver behind rising asylum applications across all European countries.

conflictDisplacement.label: Major Conflicts Driving Displacement
conflictDisplacement.description: The ten largest displacement crises by estimated displaced population. These conflicts collectively account for the majority of global forced displacement and are the source countries for most UK asylum applications.

conflictVsNonConflict.label: UK Asylum Applications: Conflict vs Non-Conflict Origin
conflictVsNonConflict.description: UK asylum applications split by whether the applicant's nationality has a grant rate above 70% (proxy for active conflict/persecution) or below. The compositional shift towards conflict-origin nationalities is the primary driver of rising overall grant rates.
